tokens.name: --font-mono
tokens.value:
"JetBrains Mono", "JetBrains Mono NL", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular,
    Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace

classes.name: absolute
classes.rule: position: absolute;

classes.name: dx-action
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; place-items: center; background: hsl(var(--foreground)); color: hsl(var(--background));

classes.name: dx-card
classes.rule: width: min(100%, 76rem); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--card)); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsl(var(--foreground) / 0.04) inset; padding: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);

classes.name: dx-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(18rem, 100%), 1fr)); gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-muted
classes.rule: color: hsl(var(--muted));

classes.name: dx-page-shell
classes.rule: align-items: center;

classes.name: dx-secondary-action
classes.rule: min-height: 2.65rem; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); padding: 0.7rem 1rem; font: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.16s, border-color 0.16s, background 0.16s;

classes.name: dx-shell
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; display: grid; place-items: center; padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 3rem);

classes.name: dx-stack
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 1rem;

classes.name: dx-template
classes.rule: min-height: 100vh; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground));

classes.name: grid
classes.rule: display: grid;

classes.name: hidden
classes.rule: display: none;

classes.name: table
classes.rule: display: table;

classes.name: visible
classes.rule: visibility: visible;

classes.name: wb-action-button
classes.rule: grid-template-columns: 18px minmax(0, 1fr);

classes.name: wb-board-base
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--wb-canvas));

classes.name: wb-board-grid
classes.rule: opacity: 0;

classes.name: wb-canvas-panel
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; min-width: 0; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: hsl(var(--background)); box-shadow: none;

classes.name: wb-canvas-scroll
classes.rule: position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; padding: 0;

classes.name: wb-canvas-sheet
classes.rule: display: block; width: 100%; min-width: 0; height: 100%; aspect-ratio: auto; transform: scale(var(--wb-zoom-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 8px; background: hsl(var(--wb-canvas)); box-shadow: 0 20px 90px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.35);

classes.name: wb-color-control
classes.rule: position: relative; display: grid; gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-color-field
classes.rule: grid-template-columns: 74px 42px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-color-picker-row
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-color-popover
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483646; top: calc(100% + 8px); right: 0; display: grid; width: min(328px, calc(100vw - 32px)); gap: 12px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface) / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: var(--wb-shadow-panel), var(--wb-shadow-inset); padding: 12px; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); pointer-events: auto; transition: opacity 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1);

classes.name: wb-color-preview
classes.rule: width: 22px; height: 22px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(var(--wb-gradient-aurora-start)) 0%, hsl(var(--wb-gradient-aurora-end)) 100%);

classes.name: wb-color-trigger
classes.rule: display: grid; min-height: 40px; grid-template-columns: 26px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; gap: 10px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; padding: 0 10px; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-connector-info
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(72px, auto) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); padding: 10px;

classes.name: wb-connector-route-controls
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-context-menu
classes.rule: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: 1000; background: hsl(var(--card) / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.15); padding: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 150px; opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); pointer-events: auto; transition: opacity 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1);

classes.name: wb-context-menu-item
classes.rule: all: unset; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: background 0.1s;

classes.name: wb-control-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-control-grid-compact
classes.rule: grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));

classes.name: wb-control-row
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 74px minmax(0, 1fr) 52px; align-items: center; gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-danger-button
classes.rule: color: hsl(var(--danger));

classes.name: wb-demo-agent
classes.rule: fill: transparent; stroke: hsl(var(--wb-swatch-violet)); stroke-width: 3;

classes.name: wb-demo-arrow-head
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--warning)); stroke: hsl(var(--warning)); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 4;

classes.name: wb-demo-frame
classes.rule: fill: transparent; stroke: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); stroke-dasharray: 14 10; stroke-width: 2;

classes.name: wb-demo-lane
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); stroke: hsl(var(--info)); stroke-width: 2;

classes.name: wb-demo-line
classes.rule: fill: none;

classes.name: wb-demo-math
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--info)); font-family: "JetBrains Mono", var(--font-mono); font-size: 34px; font-style: italic;

classes.name: wb-demo-muted-label
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: 17px;

classes.name: wb-demo-note
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--success)); font-family: "JetBrains Mono", var(--font-mono); font-size: 30px;

classes.name: wb-demo-path
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--danger)); stroke-dasharray: 12 9; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 4;

classes.name: wb-demo-storage
classes.rule: fill: transparent; stroke: hsl(var(--danger)); stroke-dasharray: 10 7; stroke-width: 3;

classes.name: wb-demo-storage-label
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--foreground)); font-size: 28px;

classes.name: wb-demo-table
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); stroke: hsl(var(--info)); stroke-width: 2;

classes.name: wb-demo-table-guide
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--info)); stroke-width: 1.5; pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-element
classes.rule: cursor: pointer;

classes.name: wb-element-label
classes.rule: font-family: var(--font-mono); font-weight: 760; pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-export-format-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-fieldset
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 8px; min-width: 0; margin: 0; border: 0; padding: 0;

classes.name: wb-file-button
classes.rule: position: relative; overflow: hidden;

classes.name: wb-file-input
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; cursor: pointer; width: auto; height: auto; opacity: 0; pointer-events: auto;

classes.name: wb-floating-tooltip
classes.rule: position: fixed; z-index: 2147483647; max-width: min(292px, calc(100vw - 20px)); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 8px; background: hsl(var(--surface)); box-shadow: 0 16px 42px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.42), inset 0 1px 0 hsl(0 0% 100% / 0.05); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 680; line-height: 1.35; opacity: 0; padding: 8px 10px; pointer-events: none; transform: var(--wb-tooltip-transform, translate(-50%, -100%)) scale(0.96); transform-origin: center; transition: opacity 140ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 190ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); white-space: normal;

classes.name: wb-font-field
classes.rule: display: grid; min-width: 0; gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-foreign-object
classes.rule: color: var(--wb-object-paint, hsl(var(--foreground))); overflow: visible;

classes.name: wb-frame-controls
classes.rule: border-top: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); padding-top: 10px;

classes.name: wb-frame-note
classes.rule: margin: 0; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: 0.72rem; line-height: 1.5;

classes.name: wb-grid-line
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--wb-grid-line)); stroke-width: 1;

classes.name: wb-grouping-controls
classes.rule: border-top: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); padding-top: 10px;

classes.name: wb-hidden-file-input
classes.rule: position: fixed; width: 1px; height: 1px; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-icon
classes.rule: width: 19px; height: 19px;

classes.name: wb-icon-button
classes.rule: display: grid; width: 40px; height: 40px; place-items: center; padding: 0;

classes.name: wb-icon-object-glyph
classes.rule: width: 42px; height: 42px;

classes.name: wb-icon-object-shell
classes.rule: border-color: currentColor; background: color-mix(in oklab, currentColor 10%, hsl(var(--surface-raised))); pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-icon-option
classes.rule: display: grid; width: 40px; height: 40px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; padding: 0;

classes.name: wb-icon-option-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 40px); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-import-error
classes.rule: margin: 0; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: 0.76rem; line-height: 1.6;

classes.name: wb-import-status
classes.rule: margin: 0; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground)); font-size: 0.72rem; line-height: 1.55;

classes.name: wb-import-summary
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-inspector-preview
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 22px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; gap: 10px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); padding: 10px;

classes.name: wb-layer-actions
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-layer-list
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 6px; max-height: 220px; overflow: auto;

classes.name: wb-layer-mark
classes.rule: border: 1px solid hsl(var(--warning));

classes.name: wb-layer-row
classes.rule: display: grid; min-height: 38px; grid-template-columns: 12px minmax(0, 1fr) auto; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 10px; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-library-card
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 18px minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 4px 9px; min-height: 58px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; padding: 10px; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-library-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-library-group
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-library-group-heading
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-measurement-chip
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; min-height: 28px; grid-template-columns: auto auto; align-items: center; gap: 5px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 999px; background: hsl(var(--muted)); padding: 0 8px;

classes.name: wb-measurement-chips
classes.rule: display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;

classes.name: wb-measurement-field
classes.rule: display: grid; min-width: 0; gap: 6px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); padding: 8px;

classes.name: wb-measurement-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-measurement-panel
classes.rule: gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-media-object-shell
classes.rule: display: grid; width: 100%; height: 100%; place-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); box-shadow: var(--wb-shadow-inset); color: var(--wb-object-paint, currentColor); overflow: hidden; pointer-events: auto;

classes.name: wb-minimap-background
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--surface-raised));

classes.name: wb-minimap-button
classes.rule: display: block; width: 100%; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: inherit; cursor: crosshair; padding: 0; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-minimap-element
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--muted-foreground) / 0.38); stroke: hsl(var(--border)); stroke-width: 0.8;

classes.name: wb-minimap-panel
classes.rule: position: absolute; right: 16px; bottom: 16px; z-index: 5; width: min(240px, calc(100% - 32px)); gap: 10px; padding: 10px;

classes.name: wb-minimap-svg
classes.rule: display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised));

classes.name: wb-minimap-viewport
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--wb-selection) / 0.12); stroke: hsl(var(--wb-selection)); stroke-width: 1.6;

classes.name: wb-number-field
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 7px;

classes.name: wb-outline-item
classes.rule: display: grid; min-height: 36px; grid-template-columns: 12px minmax(0, 1fr) auto; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 0 10px; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-outline-list
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 6px;

classes.name: wb-outline-mark
classes.rule: border: 1px solid hsl(var(--warning));

classes.name: wb-outline-panel
classes.rule: gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-outline-section
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 6px;

classes.name: wb-outline-section-heading
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; color: hsl(var(--muted-foreground));

classes.name: wb-outline-sections
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 10px; max-height: 280px; overflow: auto;

classes.name: wb-panel
classes.rule: position: relative; display: grid; min-height: 0; gap: 14px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface) / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: var(--wb-shadow-inset), 0 8px 32px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.15); padding: 14px;

classes.name: wb-panel-badge
classes.rule: border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 999px; background: hsl(var(--muted)); padding: 4px 8px; white-space: nowrap;

classes.name: wb-panel-heading
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px;

classes.name: wb-presentation-controls
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-presentation-list
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 6px; max-height: 180px; overflow: auto;

classes.name: wb-presentation-panel
classes.rule: gap: 10px;

classes.name: wb-presentation-slide
classes.rule: border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease;

classes.name: wb-preview-arrowhead
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--wb-canvas-foreground));

classes.name: wb-preview-canvas
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--wb-canvas));

classes.name: wb-preview-element
classes.rule: fill: var(--wb-preview-fill); opacity: var(--wb-preview-opacity); stroke: var(--wb-preview-stroke); stroke-dasharray: var(--wb-preview-dash); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-width: var(--wb-preview-width);

classes.name: wb-preview-grid
classes.rule: fill: url("#wb-preview-grid"); opacity: 0;

classes.name: wb-preview-grid-line
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--wb-grid-line)); stroke-width: 1;

classes.name: wb-preview-image
classes.rule: opacity: var(--wb-preview-opacity);

classes.name: wb-preview-image-frame
classes.rule: fill: none;

classes.name: wb-preview-label
classes.rule: fill: var(--wb-preview-text); font-family: var(--wb-preview-family); font-size: var(--wb-preview-font); font-weight: 760; pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-preview-selection
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--wb-selection)); stroke-dasharray: 8 6; stroke-width: 2;

classes.name: wb-preview-shape
classes.rule: fill: var(--wb-preview-fill); opacity: var(--wb-preview-opacity); stroke: var(--wb-preview-stroke); stroke-width: var(--wb-preview-width);

classes.name: wb-preview-text
classes.rule: fill: var(--wb-preview-stroke); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 760; opacity: var(--wb-preview-opacity);

classes.name: wb-primary-button
classes.rule: display: inline-grid; min-width: 0; min-height: 38px; grid-template-columns: 18px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; justify-items: start; gap: 8px; padding: 0 10px; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 720;

classes.name: wb-segmented-control
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); padding: 3px;

classes.name: wb-selection-area
classes.rule: fill: hsl(var(--wb-selection) / 0.12); stroke: hsl(var(--wb-selection)); stroke-dasharray: 6 5; stroke-width: 1.5;

classes.name: wb-selection-outline
classes.rule: fill: none; stroke: hsl(var(--wb-selection)); stroke-dasharray: 8 6; stroke-width: 2; pointer-events: none;

classes.name: wb-shortcut-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 8px;

classes.name: wb-shortcuts-panel
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483646; top: 10px; right: 10px; display: grid; width: min(420px, calc(100vw - 24px)); transition: opacity 160ms ease, transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);

classes.name: wb-side-panel
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483645; top: 10px; right: 10px; bottom: 88px; display: grid; width: min(360px, calc(100vw - 88px)); min-width: 0; min-height: 0; align-content: start; gap: 10px; overflow: auto; overscroll-behavior: contain; transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1);

classes.name: wb-stepper
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 24px minmax(0, 1fr) 24px; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(var(--surface));

classes.name: wb-swatch
classes.rule: position: relative; width: 18px; height: 18px; aspect-ratio: 1; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--swatch-color); cursor: pointer; padding: 0;

classes.name: wb-swatch-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(8, 18px); gap: 6px;

classes.name: wb-text-editor
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483646; min-width: 180px; min-height: 38px; border: 2px solid hsl(var(--primary)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: transparent; color: hsl(var(--foreground)); box-shadow: none; font-family: "JetBrains Mono", var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 760; line-height: 1.2; outline: none; padding: 8px 10px;

classes.name: wb-text-field
classes.rule: min-height: 76px; resize: vertical; padding: 9px 10px; font: inherit; line-height: 1.45;

classes.name: wb-toggle-button
classes.rule: grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr); justify-items: center;

classes.name: wb-tool-option
classes.rule: display: grid; min-height: 34px; grid-template-columns: 28px minmax(0, 1fr); align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface-raised)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); cursor: pointer; font: inherit; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 720; padding: 5px 8px; text-align: left;

classes.name: wb-tool-option-grid
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 6px;

classes.name: wb-tool-popover
classes.rule: position: relative; display: grid;

classes.name: wb-tool-popover-panel
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483644; top: auto; bottom: calc(100% + 10px); left: 50%; display: grid; width: min(276px, calc(100vw - 88px)); gap: 12px; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface) / 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: var(--wb-shadow-panel), var(--wb-shadow-inset); padding: 12px; opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0) scale(1); pointer-events: auto; transition: opacity 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1);

classes.name: wb-tool-popover-section
classes.rule: display: grid; gap: 7px;

classes.name: wb-toolbar
classes.rule: position: absolute; z-index: 2147483643; left: 50%; bottom: 14px; display: flex; max-width: calc(100vw - 28px); align-items: center; gap: 8px; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: visible; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); border-radius: var(--radius); background: hsl(var(--surface)); box-shadow: var(--wb-shadow-inset); padding: 7px; scrollbar-width: thin; transform: translateX(-50%);

classes.name: wb-toolbar-group
classes.rule: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-right: 1px solid hsl(var(--border)); padding-right: 8px;

classes.name: wb-workbench
classes.rule: position: fixed; inset: 0; display: block; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; height: 100dvh; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden; background: hsl(var(--background)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); padding: 0; z-index: 2147483641;

classes.name: wb-zoom-pill
classes.rule: display: grid; min-height: 40px; grid-template-columns: 16px 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 0 8px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 760;

classes.name: whiteboard-canvas
classes.rule: position: absolute; inset: 0; display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 0;

classes.name: whiteboard-stage
classes.rule: position: relative; width: 100%; min-width: 0; height: 100%; min-height: 0; aspect-ratio: auto; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: linear-gradient(hsl(var(--wb-grid-line) / 0.34) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, hsl(var(--wb-grid-line) / 0.34) 1px, transparent 1px), hsl(var(--wb-canvas)); background-size: 24px 24px; box-shadow: none; transform: scale(var(--wb-zoom-scale, 1)); transform-origin: center; transition: transform 180ms ease;

classes.name: whiteboard-svg-preview
classes.rule: background: hsl(var(--wb-canvas));

classes.name: whiteboard-text-editor
classes.rule: z-index: 4; resize: none; border: 1px solid hsl(var(--ring)); border-radius: 6px; background: hsl(var(--surface)); color: hsl(var(--foreground)); padding: 6px 8px;
